articles.title: India Squad Announcement Time Revealed; BCCI To Name England & Ireland Squad
articles.description:
The Board of Control for Cricket in India is preparing to unveil multiple national squads concurrently during a highly anticipated media briefing on Saturday afternoon. Chief Selector Ajit Agarkar and Board Joint Secretary Devajit Saikia will address representatives at 1 pm to confirm the touring parties for several imminent international assignments.

Unprecedented Triple Selection Window

National selectors face an intensely demanding administrative task over the next twenty-four hours. The upcoming media gathering will simultaneously reveal line-ups for three distinct major tournaments.

According to an initial report broadcast by digital sports network RevSportz, the management committee will finalise selections for the overseas developmental tours alongside the senior continental tournament.

articles.title: 'Shubman Gill will not come back': Ex-India batter makes big T20I captaincy claim
articles.description: Former India batter Mohammad Kaif strongly backs Shreyas Iyer for the T20I captaincy, citing his IPL success with Gautam Gambhir and leading franchises to finals. Kaif believes Iyer's leadership and batting prowess make him the top choice, ahead of others like Jasprit Bumrah. He also suggested the team has moved past Hardik Pandya and Shubman Gill for the role.
